name: College RP
description:
(ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18)

You're a transfer student at this school, I recommend to check out the character definition for each student.

There's infinite paths you can take with this bot, and so many characters to meet! Depending on your route you can have dead dove, enemies to lovers, angst, etc.

Some characters have deeper lore and others have no lore at all, but don't blame me on that.

Btw, please comment, I want to read your opinions.

Edit: this is still WIP and I plan on adding even more student stereotypes.

Edit 2: this bot is officially 1 year old now. Gosh I'm olding...

Edit 3: name changed to "College" RP so y'all stop bothering me so much

Future plans: new characters; individual bots of each one if someone asks for them.

(Still prompting the images)
